div.p: Technical Specification: State transitions based on missed heartbeats, threshold logic, and byte-level packet structure. Designed for implementation of a distributed failure detector (e.g., Gossip-style or Phi-Accrual).

ul.li: Spec: Expected periodicity of UDP packets.

div.p: State: DEAD Node evicted from active membership.
Phi Value Implementation: Mathematical model for adaptive network detection.

ul.li: Adaptivity: Windowed mean and variance calculation of inter-arrival times.
Benefit: Zero-config adaptation to high jitter / WiFi interference.
